stories.headline: US 30-year Treasury yield hits highest level since 2007
stories.body:
Bond markets are flashing red.

Today, the US 30Y Note Yield officially hit its highest level since July 2007, at 5.19%.

This will soon become Americans’ biggest problem, yet the vast majority do not even know it is happening.

What is happening? Let us explain.

(a thread)

stories.headline: Easy homemade kongguksu recipe using tofu and soy milk
stories.body: 일본 트친의 요청으로 만드는 콩국수 레시피!아울러 한국 사람도 콩국수 먹고 싶은데 늦은 시간 파는데 없을때 야매 콩국수 만드는 법.준비물: 두부 1모, 두유 1팩, 땅콩버터 1스푼, 설탕 반 스푼, 소금 반 스푼, 얼음 2개.만드는 법: 위에 준비물 다 믹서기에 넣고 갈기.끝!*땅콩버터 없을 땐 참깨 두 스푼으로 대체.コングクスが食べたい！でも遅い時間で店が開いてない時の「超簡単ヤミツキ・コングクス」の作り方。【準備するもの】豆腐：1丁豆乳：1パックピーナッツバター：スプーン1杯砂糖：スプーン半分塩：スプーン半分氷：2個【作り方】上の材料をすべてミキサーに入れて混ぜるだけ。以上！※ピーナッツバターがない時は、すりごま大さじ2杯で代用OK！

stories.headline: Andrej Karpathy announces joining Anthropic to work on frontier LLMs.
stories.body: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.

stories.headline: GitHub reports investigation into unauthorized access to internal repositories via poisoned VS Code extension.
stories.body: We are investigating unauthorized access to GitHub’s internal repositories. While we currently have no evidence of impact to customer information stored outside of GitHub’s internal repositories (such as our customers’ enterprises, organizations, and repositories), we are closely monitoring our infrastructure for follow-on activity.

stories.headline: GitHub details employee device compromise using poisoned VS Code extension.
stories.body:
1/ We are sharing additional details regarding our investigation into unauthorized access to GitHub's internal repositories.

Yesterday we detected and contained a compromise of an employee device involving a poisoned VS Code extension. We removed the malicious extension version, isolated the endpoint, and began incident response immediately.

stories.headline: Massive wildfire explodes in Southern California with 1,300 acres burned and 30,000 evacuated
stories.body:
🚨UPDATE: MASSIVE WILDFIRE EXPLODING in Southern California — 1,300+ Acres Burned, 30,000 People Evacuated, Thousands of Homes Threatened

Flames ripping through the area northwest of L.A. 500 firefighters battling it as residents flee in terror: “Whole area was in flames… smoke everywhere.”

Super dry conditions + years of Democrat incompetence = annual disaster.

California’s radical green policies, zero forest management, and “let nature burn” insanity have turned the state into a tinderbox every single year.

Newsom collects the highest taxes in America and still can’t stop the state from catching fire.

Prayers up for the brave firefighters and the families forced to evacuate.

stories.headline: Discussion on why conspiracy theories spread and public distrust
stories.body:
Conspiracy theories are easy to dismiss, but public distrust is more complicated than that. 

This video explores why suspicion spreads, where healthy questioning becomes dangerous, and why some real history still shapes what people believe.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R0gOQprr_YA&feature=youtu.be
